title: The Mummy With No Name
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When a spooky mummy haunts the Egyptian Mouseum, Geronimo and his friends uncover a thief in disguise and a pharaoh's sweet lost love! 🏺

q.en: Who is Professor Cyril B. Sandsnout?
q.zh: 西里尔·桑兹诺特教授是谁？

options.en: The director of the Egyptian Mouseum in New Mouse City
options.zh: 新老鼠城埃及老鼠博物馆的馆长

options.en: The owner of The Daily Rat newspaper

options.zh: 一位著名的电视自然记者

explain.en: Professor Sandsnout is the director of the Egyptian Mouseum in New Mouse City and an expert on everything about Egypt.
explain.zh: 桑兹诺特教授是新老鼠城埃及老鼠博物馆的馆长，也是一位精通埃及知识的专家。

options.zh: 佩图尼亚·漂亮爪的侄女

options.en: The cleaning lady at the museum

explain.en: Bugsy Wugsy is the niece of Petunia Pretty Paws, Geronimo's friend, and she secretly has a crush on Benjamin.
explain.zh: 巴基·乌格西是杰罗尼摩的朋友佩图尼亚·漂亮爪的侄女，而且她偷偷喜欢本杰明。

q.en: Who was really pretending to be the Mummy With No Name?
q.zh: 到底是谁假扮成了无名木乃伊？

options.zh: 一个真正的古埃及幽灵

explain.en: The Shadow, a master of disguises and Sally Ratmousen's cousin, dressed up as the mummy to scare visitors and steal the treasure.
explain.zh: 影子是伪装高手，也是莎莉·拉特莫森的表妹，她扮成木乃伊吓走游客，想偷走宝物。

q.en: According to the papyrus, what was Pharaoh Akhenraten's most precious treasure?
q.zh: 根据莎草纸的记载，法老阿肯那顿最珍贵的宝物是什么？

options.zh: 他深爱的妻子涅斐拉蒂

explain.en: The papyrus said his most precious treasure was his beloved bride Neferati, whose love was worth more than gold.
explain.zh: 莎草纸上写道，他最珍贵的宝物是深爱的妻子涅斐拉蒂，这份爱比黄金更宝贵。

q.en: How many children did Pharaoh Akhenraten and Queen Neferati have?
q.zh: 法老阿肯那顿和王后涅斐拉蒂有多少个孩子？

explain.en: The computer search said Pharaoh Akhenraten and the beautiful Neferati had twelve children and a long, happy rule.
explain.zh: 查电脑资料说，法老阿肯那顿和美丽的涅斐拉蒂育有十二个孩子，统治长久而幸福。

q.en: Where did Benjamin and Bugsy find the missing piece of the papyrus?
q.zh: 本杰明和巴基是在哪里找到莎草纸缺失的那一块的？

options.en: On top of the Bastet statue
Under a big wooden chest underground
options.zh: 在地下一只大木箱的底下

explain.en: While trapped underground, Benjamin and Bugsy found the missing end piece of the papyrus under a big wooden chest.
explain.zh: 被关在地下时，本杰明和巴基在一只大木箱的底下找到了莎草纸缺失的结尾。

options.en: Dust, mold, and even rubber flip-flops
options.zh: 灰尘、霉菌，甚至橡胶人字拖

explain.en: Geronimo mentions he is allergic to dust and mold and even rubber flip-flops, which makes the dusty museum hard for him.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说自己会对灰尘、霉菌，甚至橡胶人字拖过敏，所以满是灰尘的博物馆让他很难受。

q.en: How did Geronimo, the professor, Benjamin, and Bugsy escape the dark underground chamber?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩、教授、本杰明和巴基是怎样逃出黑暗的地下密室的？

options.en: They dug a tunnel with their paws
options.zh: 他们用爪子挖了一条地道

options.en: The Shadow opened the door for them
They waited for rescue to arrive
They formed a rodent ladder to reach the trapdoor
options.zh: 他们叠成老鼠人梯去够暗门

explain.en: They stacked on each other's shoulders to form a rodent ladder so Bugsy could push the trapdoor open and pull them out.
explain.zh: 他们一个踩一个叠成老鼠人梯，让巴基推开暗门，再用绳子把他们一个个拉出去。

q.en: Who is The Shadow related to?

options.zh: 她的表姐莎莉·拉特莫森

explain.en: The Shadow is the mysterious cousin of Sally Ratmousen, who owns The Daily Rat and is Geronimo's number-one rival.
explain.zh: 影子是莎莉·拉特莫森神秘的表妹，莎莉是《每日鼠报》的老板，也是杰罗尼摩的头号对手。

q.en: How did Geronimo end up in the hospital at the end of the story?
q.zh: 故事结尾杰罗尼摩为什么会进医院？

options.en: He tripped on Bugsy's pink skateboard and fell down stairs
options.zh: 他被巴基的粉色滑板绊倒，从楼梯摔了下去

options.en: He got lost on the plane

explain.en: After landing in New Mouse City, Geronimo tripped on Bugsy's pink skateboard and tumbled down the stairs, ending up in the hospital wrapped in bandages.
explain.zh: 回到新老鼠城下飞机后，杰罗尼摩被巴基的粉色滑板绊倒，从楼梯滚落，浑身缠着绷带住进了医院。
